game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Leo's Fortune:** Players control Leo, a sentient furball, navigating 24 hand-crafted platforming levels by using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and swiping up on the right side to inflate, allowing Leo to float or roll faster, and swiping down to deflate for precise landings. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based puzzles by manipulating environmental objects, activating switches, and timing movements to avoid various traps and hazards. The objective in each level is to collect all scattered gold coins, which act as breadcrumbs left by a thief, to progress to the next stage. Upon completing all 24 levels, a Hard-core Mode is unlocked, challenging players to finish the entire game without dying, with Game Center leaderboards tracking fastest completion times for each level.
game_info.description: Guide Leo, a fluffy furball, through challenging platforming levels to recover stolen gold coins. Navigate through physics-based puzzles by inflating to float over gaps and deflating for precise movement. Avoid deadly spikes, timing-based traps, and environmental hazards. Collect all gold coins in each level to progress. Complete all levels to unlock Hardcore Mode where a single death means starting over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (LEFT/RIGHT): Move Leo horizontally
Arrow Key (UP): Inflate Leo to float and move faster
Arrow Key (DOWN): Deflate Leo for precise landings and slower movement
SPACE: Jump (when grounded)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and physics. Validates that Leo can move left/right, jump, inflate/deflate, and interact with platforms correctly. Ensures collision detection works properly with ground and walls.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move Leo in all directions, perform jumps, test inflation and deflation states. Verify that Leo responds to gravity, collides with platforms, and doesn't fall through floors or pass through walls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Leo should move smoothly in all directions, jump when grounded, inflate/deflate affecting movement speed and fall rate. Collision detection should prevent Leo from falling through platforms or going through walls. Test passes if all movement mechanics work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by completing a level. Validates that collecting all coins triggers level completion and progression. Tests the full gameplay loop from start to finish.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through the level using optimal pathfinding, collect all gold coins while avoiding hazards. Use inflation for speed and jumping over gaps, deflation for precise landings. Reach the exit after collecting all coins.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all coins in the level, reach the exit, and trigger level completion. Game should transition to the next level or show victory screen. Test passes when GAME_OVER_WIN state is achieved after completing all available levels.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests hazard interaction and death mechanics. Validates that touching spikes or falling into pits triggers game over. Ensures respawn or restart mechanics work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally guide Leo into hazards like spikes and pits. Verify that contact results in death and appropriate game state changes. Test respawn behavior if implemented.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Leo should die upon touching hazards, triggering GAME_OVER_LOSE state. The game should handle death appropriately, either respawning Leo or showing game over screen. Test passes if hazard detection and death mechanics work correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests coin collection mechanics and score tracking. Validates that coins are properly detected, collected, and removed from the level. Ensures score updates correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate to each coin in the level, ensuring collision detection properly registers collection. Verify that collected coins disappear and are not recollectable. Monitor score updates.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Each coin should be collected exactly once, removed from rendering, and increment the score. All coins should be collectible without glitches. Test passes if all coins can be collected and score tracking is accurate.
TEST_4.description: Tests coin collection mechanics and score tracking. Validates that coins are properly detected, collected, and removed from the level. Ensures score updates correctly.
TEST_4.strategy: Navigate to each coin in the level, ensuring collision detection properly registers collection. Verify that collected coins disappear and are not recollectable. Monitor score updates.
TEST_4.expected: Each coin should be collected exactly once, removed from rendering, and increment the score. All coins should be collectible without glitches. Test passes if all coins can be collected and score tracking is accurate.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests level progression and multiple level completion. Validates that completing one level properly loads the next level with reset state. Ensures game difficulty scales appropriately.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Complete multiple levels in sequence, collecting all coins and reaching exits. Verify that each new level loads with proper initialization, coins reset, and Leo starts at the correct position.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Levels should progress sequentially with proper state reset. Each level should be playable independently. Test passes if multiple levels can be completed in sequence without errors or state persistence issues.
